---
title: "Downloads & Resources"
subtitle: "Access All Learning Materials"
---

# 📥 Downloads & Resources

Access all course materials for offline use or integration with your preferred tools.

---

## 🐍 Python Track Downloads

### Jupyter Notebooks
Download individual or all Python quest notebooks:

- [Download All Python Notebooks (.zip)](#) - All 19 quests
- [Individual Notebooks](files/python/lessons/) - Download specific quests

### Additional Resources
- [Python Quick Reference (PDF)](#)
- [Python Cheat Sheet](#)
- [Practice Exercises](#)

[Browse Python Files →](files/python/)

---

## 🦀 Rust Track Downloads

### Rust Example Code
Download Rust quest examples:

- [Download All Rust Examples (.zip)](#) - All 19 quests
- [Individual Examples](files/rust/lessons/) - Download specific quests

### Additional Resources
- [Rust Quick Reference (PDF)](#)
- [Rust Ownership Guide](#)
- [Practice Projects](#)

[Browse Rust Files →](files/rust/)

---

## 🎮 Pygame Track Downloads

### Complete Game Projects
Download full game projects with source code:

- [Download All Games (.zip)](#) - All 7 complete games
- Individual Games:
  - [Quest 1: Maze Explorer](#)
  - [Quest 2: Bouncing Ball](#)
  - [Quest 3: Pong Game](#)
  - [Quest 4: Snake Game](#)
  - [Quest 5: Flappy Bird](#)
  - [Quest 6: Frogger](#)
  - [Quest 7: Dungeon Crawler](#)

### Game Assets
- [Sprite Sheets](#)
- [Sound Effects](#)
- [Background Music](#)

[Browse Pygame Files →](files/pygame/)

---

## 📚 Documentation Downloads

### Guides & References
- [Complete Curriculum Guide (PDF)](#)
- [Instructor's Manual (PDF)](#)
- [Setup & Installation Guide](#)
- [FAQ Document](#)

---

## 🔧 Setup Files

### Development Environment
- [requirements.txt](requirements.txt) - Python dependencies
- [.python-version](.python-version) - Recommended Python version
- [VS Code Settings](#) - Recommended editor configuration

---

## 💻 Using Downloaded Materials

### Jupyter Notebooks
```bash
# Install Jupyter
pip install jupyter

# Navigate to notebook directory
cd files/python/lessons

# Launch Jupyter
jupyter notebook
```

### Pygame Projects
```bash
# Install dependencies
pip install pygame

# Or use UV (recommended)
uv sync

# Run a game
python src_instructor/game.py
```

### Rust Code
```bash
# Ensure Rust is installed
rustc --version

# Compile and run
rustc example.rs
./example
```

---

## 🤝 Need Help?

Having trouble with downloads?

- 📧 [Email Support](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
- 🐛 [Report Issue](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/issues)
- 💬 [Ask in Discussions](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/discussions)

---

[← Back to Home](index.qmd)
